description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Enhanced MTR train service from 31 August
description.LOCATION_EN: East Rail Line, Tseung Kwan O Line and Tuen Ma Line Service Disruption
description.LOCATION_CN: 東鐵綫，將軍澳綫及屯馬綫服務延誤

2024-08-30T12:18:00.CONTENT_EN: MTRCL is enhancing the train service on East Rail Line, Tseung Kwan O Line and Tuen Ma Line during specific periods from 31 August 2024, total 112 extra train trips added each week. For more information, please browse MTRCL website.
2024-08-30T12:18:00.CONTENT_CN: 港鐵將於8月31日起加強東鐵綫、將軍澳綫及屯馬綫部份時段的列車服務，每周共增加112班列車。詳情請瀏覽港鐵網頁。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Structural / Mechanical Defects or Closure of Access

2024-08-30T13:27:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to vessel defects, the following Water Taxi services will be or have been suspended. 
Fortune Ferry Company Limited
-Tsim Sha Tsui East: suspended at 01:20 pm and 02:20 pm
-Wan Chai: suspended at 01:35 pm, 02:05 pm, 02:35 pm, 03:05 pm
-Central: suspended at 01:50 pm and 02:50 pm.
2024-08-30T13:27:00.CONTENT_CN:
因船隻機件故障，以下水上的士服務將會或已經暫停服務。
富裕小輪有限公司
-尖東:下午01時20分及下午02時20分暫停
-灣仔:下午01時35分、下午02時05分、下午02時35分及下午03時05分暫停
-中環:下午01時50分及下午02時50分暫停。

2024-08-30T15:09:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following Water Taxi service which was suspended due to vessel mechanical defects will be or have been resumed:
Fortune Ferry Company Limited
- Departed from Tsim Sha Tsui East: resumes at 03:20 pm
- Departed from Wan Chai: resumes at 03:35 pm
- Departed from Central: resumes at 03:50 pm.
2024-08-30T15:09:00.CONTENT_CN:
較早前因受船隻機件故障⽽停航的以下⽔上的⼠服務將會或已經恢復服務:
富裕小輪有限公司
-尖東開出:下午03時20分恢復
-灣仔開出:下午03時35分恢復
-中環開出:下午03時50分恢復。

description.LOCATION_CN: 港珠澳大橋香港連接路

2024-08-31T15:50:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR, with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.

2024-08-31T16:50:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR resumes to 100 km/h.

2024-09-01T16:07:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Gloucester Road (Central bound) near Percival Street which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-09-01T16:07:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的告士打道(往中環方向)近波斯富街的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-09-01T16:30:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of San Tin Highway (Yuen Long bound) near Mai Po is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-09-01T16:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，新田公路(往元朗方向)近米埔的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-09-01T17:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of San Tin Highway (Yuen Long bound) near Mai Po which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-09-01T17:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的新田公路(往元朗方向)近米埔的部份行車線現已解封。
